$description: MyVault icon manifest. References Phosphor Icons (https://phosphoricons.com) as a versioned dependency — no SVGs are committed to the vault. The 210 icons listed here are MyVault's curated subset of Phosphor's library; renderers consume Phosphor directly via @phosphor-icons/react, @phosphor-icons/web, the @phosphor-icons/core SVG distribution, or the public CDN. See README.md for the rationale and per-renderer integration notes.
